OPPOSITION OF ALLGIRE GENERAL CONTRACT, INC. TO MOTION TO VACATE ARBITRATION BY SHAWN OLEARY DBA DIVERSIFIED METAL MFG. (TRANSACTION ID # 64507624) (TRANSACTION ID # 64507624) FILED BY RESPONDENT ALLGIRE GENERAL CONTRACTORS, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER SHAWN O'LEARY'S MOTION TO VACATE ARBITRATION MOTION TO COMPEL CONTRACTOR STATE LICENSE BOARD TO CONTINUE AND COMPLETE INVESTIGATION OF DEFENDANT PREVIOUSLY STARTED. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING. SHAWN O'LEARY'S "MOTION TO VACATE ARBITRATION" IS DENIED. CCP 1288 PROVIDES THAT A PETITION TO VACATE AN ARBITRATION AWARD "SHALL BE SERVED AND FILED NOT LATER THAN 100 DAYS AFTER THE DATE OF THE SERVICE OF A SIGNED COPY OF THE AWARD." O'LEARY DOES NOT CONTEND THAT HE MET THIS DEADLINE; INDEED, THE ARBITRATION AWARD WAS ISSUED IN FEBRUARY 2018. O'LEARY'S OTHER REQUESTED RELIEF IS MOOTED BY THE DENIAL OF HIS "MOTION TO VACATE ARBITRATION." DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312.(AS FULLY REPORTED IN THE REPORTER'S NOTES/TRANSCRIPT). JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Mtn To Vacate Arbitration Mtn To Compel Contractor State License Board To Continue And Complete Investigation Of Deft Previously Started
Off Calendar Dec-20-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Shawn O'Leary, 209-857-9033 Plaintiff in Pro Per through Court Call.
Danielle Ward, Esq. 619-686-1930 of Balestreri Potocki & Homes for Defendant Richard Allgire dba Allgire General Contractors through court Call.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court indicates it did not receive any email contesting the tentative ruling. Petitioner argues and requests the arbitration be ruled invalid. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER SHAWN O'LEARY's Motion To Vacate Arbitration Motion To Compel Contractor State License Board To Continue And Complete Investigation Of Defendant Previously Started.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Shawn O'Leary's "motion to vacate arbitration" is denied. CCP 1288 provides that a petition to vacate an arbitration award "shall be served and filed not later than 100 days after the date of the service of a signed copy of the award." O'Leary does not contend that he met this deadline; indeed, the arbitration award was issued in February 2018. O'Leary's other requested relief is mooted by the denial of his "motion to vacate arbitration."

Defendant to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
